title: Scyap's Tropical Slimes Mod
description: This mod adds Tropical Slimes from the discontinued mobile spin-off game, Minecraft Earth
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-WeC4sKhXps" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


# Mod Information:
This mod adds Tropical Slimes from Minecraft Earth with additional features


Features:
- Tropical Slimes will drop tropical fish items when killed
- You can use a bucket on a Tropical Slime to get a bucket of tropical fish (you will kill the tropical slime tho)
- Tropical Slimes can spawn in Jungle biomes and Warm Ocean biomes.
- Tropical Slimes that spawn within Ocean biomes will spawn as Coral Variant with a random coral on their head (like a hat).
- Coral from Tropical Slimes can be sheared off and grow using bone meals.
- Tropical Slimes with "Alive" coral variants will transform into their respective "Dead" coral variants whenever they're in the Nether
- Tropical Slimes that aren't coral variants can become any coral variants by clicking it with a coral item.
- Tropical Slimes have two different appearance for the Coral Fan variant (Side or Surface Placed Forms).
